---
title: "技能"
anchor: "skills"
---

# 技能

## 编程语言

::: skills-grid

::: skill-category
### 熟练掌握
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
<span class="skill-tag">C/C++</span>
<span class="skill-tag">R</span>
:::
:::

::: skill-category
### 进阶使用
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">Java</span>
<span class="skill-tag">JavaScript</span>
<span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
<span class="skill-tag">HTML/CSS</span>
:::
:::

:::

## 机器学习与深度学习框架

::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
<span class="skill-tag">TensorFlow</span>
<span class="skill-tag">scikit-learn</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Keras</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Hugging Face</span>
<span class="skill-tag">OpenCV</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Pandas</span>
<span class="skill-tag">NumPy</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Matplotlib</span>
:::

## 研究工具

::: skills-grid

::: skill-category
### 开发环境
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">Linux/Shell</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Git/GitHub</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Docker</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Jupyter Notebook</span>
<span class="skill-tag">VS Code</span>
:::
:::

::: skill-category
### 科研工具
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">LaTeX (Overleaf)</span>
<span class="skill-tag">EndNote</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Zotero</span>
<span class="skill-tag">MATLAB</span>
<span class="skill-tag">SPSS</span>
:::
:::

::: skill-category
### 云计算平台
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">Google Cloud</span>
<span class="skill-tag">阿里云</span>
<span class="skill-tag">GPU服务器</span>
:::
:::

:::

## 语言能力

::: skills-grid

::: skill-category
### 中文
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">母语</span>
:::
:::

::: skill-category
### 英语
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">CET-6: [分数，如550+]</span>
<span class="skill-tag">雅思：[分数]</span>
<span class="skill-tag">GRE：[分数]</span>
:::
:::

::: skill-category
### 其他
::: skill-list
<span class="skill-tag">日语 JLPT N3</span>
<span class="skill-tag">[其他语言能力]</span>
:::
:::

:::
